---
title: 幂零锥和其上的几何
description: The geometry of the nilpotent cone in Lie algebras
image: marisa-hat.jpg

listing:
  include:
    collections: ["nilpcone"]
  exclude:
    draft: true

format:
  html: default

metadata-files:
  - ../_listing-style.yml
  - ../_listing-filter.yml
---

- [经典李代数的幂零轨道专题](https://sun123zxy.github.io/nilpotent-orbit-classical/)
